root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky under the race detector because a goroutine wrote to an outer-scope variable (`err`) shared across goroutines. This PR stabilizes it by using a goroutine-local variable (`:=`) so the error value is not shared, eliminating the data race.
fix_pattern: Avoid sharing mutable variables across goroutines in tests; use goroutine-local variables (e.g., `:=`) to prevent -race data races.
